message:
fix(ui): + button spacing (#6132) and Console Studio overlap in full-screen (#6130) (#6139)

- MissionSidebar: add mr-2 to the '+ New mission' button so it has
  breathing room from the adjacent Globe/Rocket toolbar icons.
  Reported by @xonas1101 as follow-up to #6101.

- FloatingDashboardActions: hide the Console Studio FAB when the AI
  Mission sidebar is expanded to full-screen. In full-screen mode the
  mission list and chat UI cover the whole viewport and the FAB would
  overlap them. Reported by @ghanshyam2005singh.

Fixes #6132
Fixes #6130

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
